content.full_text:
March 9, 1990

Linda Cassidy
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms. Cassidy:

I am writing to confirm our conversation of 2/27/90 in which we discussed the aggregation of contributions. My question to you involved contributions from a family owned business and from members of the family which direct and control the business's contributions. You advised that only one family member's contribution would be aggregated with the company's contribution, and that, the other family members could donate the maximum contribution.

Please confirm this in writing.

Sincerely,

Kelly Barrales
460 2nd Avenue
Redwood City, CA 94062
(415) 366-2312
